per_turn_leaks.student_message: When you have those episodes, do you notice anything else happening to your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: When I have those episodes of crampy pain, I feel really urgent to use the bathroom, like I'm going to lose control if I don't get there right away. And yeah, the diarrhea is usually watery and loose, it's like my stomach just empties out completely.
